query: 查询所有用户
sql: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 300;

query: 查询用户的用户名和邮箱
sql: SELECT username, email FROM users LIMIT 300;

query: 查询用户的真实姓名和手机号
sql: SELECT real_name, phone FROM users LIMIT 300;

query: 查询年龄大于18的用户
sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE birthday < date('now', '-18 years') LIMIT 300

query: 查询创建时间等于2024-01-01的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at = '2024-01-01' LIMIT 300;

query: 查询用户名包含张三的用户
sql: SELECT id, username, real_name, email, phone, gender, birthday, status, user_level, total_points, registered_at, last_login_at FROM users WHERE username LIKE '%张三%' LIMIT 300;

query: 查询状态不等于已删除的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_status != '已删除' LIMIT 300

query: 查询年龄大于18且状态等于激活的用户
sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE birthday < date('now', '-18 years') AND status = '激活' LIMIT 300

query: 查询订单金额大于100且小于1000的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE pay_amount > 100 AND pay_amount < 1000 LIMIT 300

query: 查询用户及其订单
sql: SELECT users.id, users.username, users.email, orders.id, orders.order_no, orders.order_status, orders.total_amount AS pay_amount, orders.created_at FROM users INNER JOIN orders ON orders.user_id = users.id ORDER BY orders.created_at DESC LIMIT 300

query: 查询订单对应的用户名和订单金额
sql: SELECT users.username, orders.total_amount FROM orders INNER JOIN users ON orders.user_id = users.id LIMIT 300

query: 查询用户及其收货地址
sql: SELECT users.id, users.username, users.real_name, users.phone, users.email, addresses.receiver_name, addresses.phone, addresses.province, addresses.city, addresses.district, addresses.detail_address, addresses.postal_code, addresses.is_default FROM users INNER JOIN addresses ON addresses.user_id = users.id LIMIT 300;

query: 查询购买了商品的用户及其评价
sql: SELECT users.id, users.username, users.real_name, product_reviews.id, product_reviews.rating, product_reviews.content, product_reviews.created_at FROM users INNER JOIN product_reviews ON product_reviews.user_id = users.id ORDER BY product_reviews.created_at DESC LIMIT 300

query: 统计用户数量
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users LIMIT 300;

query: 求和所有订单金额
sql: SELECT SUM(orders.pay_amount) AS total_amount FROM orders LIMIT 300

query: 计算订单平均金额
sql: SELECT AVG(pay_amount) FROM orders LIMIT 300

query: 按城市分组统计用户数量
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, address_id FROM users GROUP BY address_id LIMIT 300

query: 按月份统计订单总金额
sql: SELECT SUM(pay_amount) AS pay_amount, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) AS month FROM orders GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) LIMIT 300

query: 按注册时间降序查询用户
sql: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY registered_at DESC LIMIT 300;

query: 按订单金额升序查询前10个订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY pay_amount ASC LIMIT 10

query: 查询最近注册的5个用户
sql: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY registered_at DESC LIMIT 5

query: 查询订单金额大于100的用户名和邮箱
sql: SELECT users.username, users.email FROM orders INNER JOIN users ON orders.user_id = users.id WHERE orders.total_amount > 100 LIMIT 300

query: 按城市分组统计平均订单金额
sql: SELECT AVG(orders.pay_amount) AS avg_pay_amount, addresses.city FROM orders INNER JOIN addresses ON orders.address_id = addresses.id GROUP BY addresses.city LIMIT 300

query: 查询最近30天下过单的用户数量
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT users.id) FROM users INNER JOIN orders ON orders.user_id = users.id WHERE orders.created_at >= date('now', '-30 days') LIMIT 300

query: DROP TABLE users
sql: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 300;

query: DELETE FROM users WHERE id=1
sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = 1 LIMIT 300;

query: UPDATE users SET age=20
sql: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 300;

query: INSERT INTO users VALUES
sql: SELECT values FROM users LIMIT 300;
SELECT * FROM addresses LIMIT 300;

sql: SELECT * FROM addresses LIMIT 300;

query: 随便说点什么
sql: SELECT id, name, price, stock FROM products ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 300
